subcodes.first_line: During His stay in Bushihr, the Bab achieved extraordinary things and thoroughly demolished the foundation of people's corrupt practices...The merchants of Bushihr practised dabbih. That is, the merchants, after having negotiated a transaction
subcodes.first_line_orig: حضرت اعلی در ایام توقفشان در بوشهر... تجار بوشهری رسمی داشتند که بعد از ختم هر معامله ای
subcodes.subjects: @conduct in finance and business, @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab, @business; financial; property matters
